name: Traditional Greek Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 ripe medium tomatoes, cored and quartered
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Decoratively arrange the tomatoes, cucumber, olives, feta cheese and red onion on a platter.
2. In a small bowl whisk together the vinegar, oil, oregano, salt and pepper.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad and serve.
Yield: 2 to 3 servings
